arts.ttl: Ed Sheeran Reacts to Ipswich Town's Stunning Premier League Victory vs. Chelsea
arts.sum: Ed Sheeran cheered on Ipswich Town's 2–0 victory over Chelsea at Portman Road.

arts.ttl: McKenna after beating Chelsea: It's a special night
arts.sum: Winning the home game is another special little landmark. But I think the time of year, the night game, the opponent make this a special night and I want everyone to enjoy it a lot.

arts.ttl: Omari Hutchinson shows true colours with eye-catching celebration against ex-club Chelsea
arts.sum: Omari Hutchinson spent five years with Chelsea across two spells but did not hesitate to celebrate in style after he scored Ipswich Town's second goal on Monday night

arts.ttl: Ipswich beat Chelsea to claim first Premier League home win in 22 years
arts.sum: Liam Delap scored and assisted in the Tractor Boys’ first home victory in the top-flight since 2002.

arts.ttl: Premier League forced to release two statements during Ipswich vs Chelsea amid referee drama
arts.sum: The last Premier League action of 2024 was not without controversy - as it had a major say in Chelsea falling to a disappointing 2-0 defeat at strugglers Ipswich Town. Three goals on the night, two left standing after the intervention of VAR, and the two instances critical refereeing reviews were required both ended up in the hosts' favour .

arts.ttl: Five out, two in and £40m demand - Chelsea's January transfer window state of play - football.london
arts.sum: Click this link to follow the football.london Chelsea WhatsApp channel, where you'll be kept up to date on the latest Blues news wherever you are. Five players, including Disasi, are believed to be on the radar for exits.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners 'leading Chelsea & Liverpool' in race for Bundesliga star
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly leading Chelsea and Liverpool in the race to sign Egypt international Omar Marmoush from Bundesliga side Eintracht Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town vs. Chelsea team news: Enzo Maresca makes five changes for Premier League fixture
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca makes five changes to his Chelsea XI for Monday's Premier League game at Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer market value exceeds £100m as Chelsea handed major transfer boost
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca will be looking to streamline his squad in January - and he will be happy to see the value of his players has shot up following their incredible start to the season. The squads Premier League performances, alongside their domination in the Conference League, has helped increase the players' market values according to transfermarkt .

arts.ttl: Ipswich vs Chelsea - Premier League: Live plus updates from Aston Villa vs Brighton
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Chelsea travel to Portman road to take on Ipswich Town and Aston Villa host Brighton in Premier League action.
